title: Author a presence-backed online-users list
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/presence_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.PresenceLive). mount/3 subscribes to "presence:room:#{room_id}" (scoped) if connected?. It must call Phoenix.Presence.track/3 via MyAppWeb.Presence with the user id. handle_info({Phoenix.Presence.Event, :join, _presence}, socket) and (:leave) clauses update the stream :online via stream_insert / stream_delete. mount/3 takes %{"room_id" => room_id} from session.
tier_rationale: Requires presence concepts + stream + scoped topic. Non-trivial multi-piece wiring.
